verse_text: And Jesus answered and said to them, 'Do you suppose that these Galileans were worse sinners than all other Galileans, because they suffered such things?

links.context: Rejoicing: See [[LUK.6:22]], [[LUK.6:23]]. Suffering is not necessarily a sign of God's displeasure, as thought by many Jews (see [[LUK.13:1]]-4; [[JOH.9:1]]-3). Rather, Christians accept persecution joyfully, knowing that the rewards of the Kingdom far outweigh any sufferings on earth. See also [[ROM.5:3]]-5.
